subcodes.first_line: O thou servant at the Threshold of the One God! Thy letter was received and perused. It was not a mere petition, but rather a garden of surpassing beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حضرت احدیت عریضه واصل و ملاحظه گردید عریضه نبود حدیقه انیقه بود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
